data.title: Complications of Laparoscopic Hiatal Hernia Repair Complicated by Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease Using the ERAS Protocol
data.brief_summary: Nissen fundoplication with cruroraphy performed according to ERAS protocols in patients with HH complicated by GERD.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria: were clinically significant hiatal hernia complicated by GERD, confirmed endoscopically and by radiological methods, age from 18 to 80 years and ineffectiveness of drug therapy for more than 6 months.

\-

Exclusion Criteria: were patients who had previously undergone surgery on
endpoints: decreased complication rate and high patient satisfaction
